workData.title: Multithreaded Task Processing Server (C++)
workData.description: Developed a high-performance C++ server for VoIP systems that handles thousands of concurrent tasks. Implemented multithreading with thread-safe queues and CPU core pinning to optimize parallel task execution, ensuring minimal latency and maximal throughput in live traffic environments.

workData.title: High-Performance Network Traffic Processing Tool (C++)
workData.description: Engineered a C++ tool for real-time processing and analysis of large-scale VoIP and network traffic. The tool efficiently parses, filters, and processes raw packet streams, leveraging optimized data structures and memory management for low-latency, high-throughput operation.

workData.title: Media Conversion and Analysis Tool (FFmpeg & C++)
workData.description: Built a CLI tool integrating FFmpeg with custom C++ logic to convert and process raw media captured from VoIP streams. Features include H.264 and RTP payload parsing, real-time video/audio extraction, and modular design allowing easy extension for additional codecs and traffic analysis.

workData.title: Blockchain Implementation (Go)
workData.description: Developed a blockchain in Go with a custom Proof-of-Work mechanism, hash-linked blocks, and tamper-detection logic. The blockchain supports fast block retrieval via a hash map, full chain validation, and a CLI-style demonstration showing block integrity before and after simulated tampering. Designed for educational purposes and to demonstrate secure data structures and distributed ledger concepts.

workData.title: Full Stack Service Platform (Flutter + Node.js)
workData.description: A complete service platform with Flutter frontend and Node.js backend for seamless operations.

workData.title: Identity & Access Management Integration
workData.description: Integration of Keycloak for secure identity and access management in enterprise applications.

workData.title: Containerized E-commerce Platform
workData.description: A containerized e-commerce platform with microservices architecture for scalability.

workData.title: CRM Platform (Full Stack)
workData.description: A full-stack CRM system for managing customers, services, and job tracking with a modern web interface and backend API.

workData.title: Discord Message Delete Bot
workData.description: An automation bot that monitors and deletes specific Discord messages based on rules and filters.

workData.title: Expense Tracker App (Flutter)
workData.description: A mobile app for tracking daily expenses with category-wise analytics and local data storage.

workData.title: Quiz App (Flutter)
workData.description: A quiz application with multiple categories, score tracking, and interactive UI built using Flutter.

workData.title: Meals App (Flutter)
workData.description: A recipe browsing app with filters, favorites, and category-based meal browsing built in Flutter.

workData.title: Dice Roller App (Flutter)
workData.description: A simple Flutter application demonstrating state management and UI interaction through a dice rolling simulator.
